gold: Tôi muốn xem lại sao kê ngay bây giờ. Tôi cần có chuyện gấp.

werNormalizedGold: toi muon xem lai sao ke ngay bay gio toi can co chuyen gap
werNormalizedPredicted: toi muon xem lai sao ke ngay bay gio toi con co chuyen cap
sigWerNormalizedGold: toi muon xem lai sao ke ngay bay gio toi can co chuyen gap
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: toi muon xem lai sao ke ngay bay gio toi con co chuyen cap

sigWerErrors.reason: 'can' (need) and 'con' (child) are completely different words in Vietnamese and change the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'gap' (urgent) and 'cap' (class/level) are unrelated in meaning and this substitution makes the sentence incoherent or changes the intent.
